name: kicks
description: Contador web gratuito de movimientos durante el embarazo

scripts.check: npm run test && npm run build

notes.production: Node.js is NOT required for production. The application runs on PHP 8.2+ with Apache 2.4+. Use 'php scripts/build.php' to compile assets.
notes.development: Node.js 20+ can be used for running tests and build scripts during development. Use 'php scripts/build.php' or 'npm run build' to compile assets.
